note: Fixed starting point for the 120-day growth contract. The contract is evaluated against the final 28-day window only; this record is the anchor that makes the evaluation auditable. Do NOT edit historical figures once committed — append new snapshot records instead (growth-report.yml writes weekly snapshots to docs/metrics/snapshots/).

newSiteStart.event: Google read the current sitemap.xml and discovered the current /game/<slug>/ URL space

googleSearchConsole.exclusionCohortNote: The 1,128 excluded URLs are LEGACY shapes, NOT the current /game/<slug>/ pages. They must not be merged with new-page metrics as if they were one cohort. New pages are a fresh cohort starting 2026-07-22.

cloudflareEdgeAnalytics.reason: Dominated by requests and possible bots. Not a human-traffic signal. Excluded from the growth contract per GROWTH-AUTOMATION-PLAN.md operating constraints.

firstPartyPlayClicks.status: not yet live — endpoint implemented in issue #5 but D1 binding requires owner config (see docs/PLAY-CLICK-METRIC.md)

adSenseRevenue.status: not yet received — recorded only after actual cash receipt per operating constraint 3
